body:
Anna, great to hear from you — always appreciate you taking the time to share what you're seeing across the market. I've been heads-down on a few new positions here at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital), but your note on the grid-edge infrastructure space has me thinking we should compare notes more seriously. We've had two founders come through our pipeline in the last six weeks building in exactly that intersection of distributed energy resources and real-time ML inference, and I'm curious whether you're seeing similar deal flow from your vantage point. I'd love to grab thirty minutes this week or next if you have a window — even a quick call would be valuable given how fast some of these rounds are moving. As always, grateful to have you in my corner on the harder judgment calls.

Amara
